claim: Universal RGB-to-spectrum recovery is possible from a single processed RGB image
rationale: Non-identifiability and prior dependence are established.
admissible_scope: Any future model must output uncertainty, abstention, and evidence/prior attribution.

claim: Metamerism is a novel explanation for RGB skin error
rationale: Metamerism and null-space limits are established.
admissible_scope: Novelty may lie in real-skin prevalence, severity, and tone-conditioned observability.

rationale: Low-dimensional spectral structure and basis methods are established.
admissible_scope: Measure effective dimension and alignment with camera row spaces across strata.

claim: A new neural architecture is the core novelty
rationale: Architecture families and benchmarks are mature.
admissible_scope: Architecture is admissible only after a registered physical gap is shown.

claim: Camera calibration solves arbitrary skin measurement
rationale: Calibration improves consistency under conditions but cannot recover unmeasured spectral information.
admissible_scope: Quantify calibration boundary and residual observability loss.

claim: ITA is a direct melanin measurement
rationale: ITA is a colorimetric/appearance descriptor and may be image- or device-dependent.
admissible_scope: Use ITA as measured color descriptor; separate erythema, site, specular, and instrument effects.

claim: Polarization is novel for skin sensing
admissible_scope: Compare incremental information gain and cost against alternative added measurements.

claim: Layered skin biophysical inversion is novel
rationale: Forward and inverse skin models already exist.
admissible_scope: Novelty may lie in falsification, identifiability, model discrepancy, and evidence/prior accounting.

claim: CRB or wavelength optimization alone is novel
prior_art_basis: Prior-art report + existing tissue sensing literature
rationale: CRB and wavelength-design methods are established.
admissible_scope: Use CRB only as machinery for a new real-skin, camera-specific decomposition.

claim: Dermatology AI has a tone gap
rationale: The empirical gap has already been studied.
admissible_scope: Novelty may lie in physics/contrast/data-quality attribution and independent replication.

claim: Real-skin camera observability can be measured across realistic operator families
rationale: No supplied work closes real-skin manifold-to-camera observability across tone, site, instrument, camera, and illuminant.
admissible_scope: Principal angles, null energy, real collision enumeration, cross-dataset replication.

claim: Physically plausible real-skin metamers can be enumerated and severity quantified
rationale: Generic metamers are established; physiological prevalence/severity on measured skin remains open.
admissible_scope: Direct collisions plus constrained metamer generation within measured/physical skin support.

claim: Measurement evidence can be separated from population-prior reconstruction
rationale: Existing reconstruction often conflates measurement with prior.
admissible_scope: Posterior decomposition, prior-only baseline, camera-evidence ablation, OOD/abstention.

claim: Tone-dependent uncertainty can be decomposed across interacting mechanisms
rationale: Individual mechanisms are known; fractional, interaction-aware attribution on real skin is not closed.
admissible_scope: Projection, photon, camera, illuminant, tissue collinearity, specular, ISP, and data quality.

claim: Minimum additional measurement can be optimized under parity and cost constraints
rationale: Candidate modalities exist; comparative minimum sufficient measurement remains open.
admissible_scope: Pareto/minimax design across NIR, multi-flash, polarization, RAW, references, repeats.

claim: A physics-derived recoverability score explains clinical error after alternatives are controlled
rationale: Clinical disparity and alternative explanations exist; causal bridge remains unproven.
admissible_scope: DDI discovery, DDI-2 replication, CleanPatrick control, lesion-contrast horse race.

claim: Universal validated RGB-to-true-color corrector exists with current assets
rationale: Current held assets lack paired consumer image and measured spectrum of the same patch.
admissible_scope: Requires new paired acquisition with RAW/JPEG, spectrum, colorimeter, references, repeats.
